nodes.label: WhatsApp-Based Reservation Pattern
nodes.rationale: Instead of a backend form submission, reservations are sent via WhatsApp deep links. This avoids server infrastructure for reservations while leveraging a communication channel already familiar to the target audience in Bangladesh.
